meta.title: Avalo | Web Development & Enterprise AI Automation
meta.description: Avalo digital engineering company: professional-grade websites, enterprise AI automation, and AI customer service for individuals and enterprises. Transparent fixed pricing, order online, deployment and long-term care included.

hero.label: Engineering · Design · Automation
hero.desc: From brand websites and revenue-ready e-commerce to enterprise AI automation and intelligent support — Avalo delivers professional-grade systems for individuals and enterprises of every size: design, build, deploy, maintain. Every price published. No haggling.

services.label: Core Services
services.intro: Avalo unites design, full-stack engineering, and cloud architecture under one roof — one accountable team from discovery to long-term operations, with no layers of subcontracting. We also cover what the market underserves: LINE OA AI support, report automation, and AI search optimization (getting ChatGPT to recommend your business).

items.name: Web Design & Development
items.desc: Fully custom design, responsive layouts, SEO, payments and admin dashboards — websites that bring customers and orders, not just pretty facades.

items.name: Enterprise AI Automation
items.desc: AI customer service, workflow automation, auto-generated reports. Hand repetitive work to systems — the labor saved pays it back within a year.

items.name: Systems & Custom Development
items.desc: Membership systems, ERP/POS integration, API development, data engineering. When off-the-shelf software can't do it, Avalo builds it for you.

pricing.label: Transparent Pricing
pricing.intro: These are our pre-assembled bundle deals — all prices public, with market ranges to compare. But they're just common combos: your needs can be fully custom, and we'll suggest more ways to save you time. Mix the à la carte features below, or just tell us what you need for a quote.
pricing.notice:
✦ All plans include: discovery call, design approval, testing & launch
✦ Prices exclude 5% VAT, added at checkout
✦ Builds include first month of care; subscriptions cancellable anytime
pricing.addonHeading: À La Carte · Mix Your Own
pricing.addonIntro: Don't want a full bundle? Pick the individual features you need, or add them onto any bundle. Reference prices below; the final quote is confirmed at consultation based on integration scope.
pricing.addonNote: ✦ Reference prices (pre-tax), freely combinable. For anything not listed or larger systems (full accounting, inventory, ERP integration), use the consultation below for a quote.

custom.label: Enterprise
custom.name: Custom System Development
custom.desc: Mix the features above, or describe your needs — accounting systems, ERP integration, high-traffic architecture, AI products, all doable. A written fixed quote after a free consultation, final as always.

cases.label: Selected Work
cases.intro: No concept mockups, no fake screenshots. Every project below was built by Avalo and is running in production — click through and verify.

items.name: Finance Automation System
items.label: FIN
items.desc: A fully custom accounting system built from scratch: staff snap a photo of a receipt on Telegram and it's booked automatically, while the back office handles fixed-asset depreciation, FX, month-end close and P&L / balance-sheet reporting — fully governable and auditable. Not a template; a system grown around the client's own process.

items.name: JeanToGo
items.label: JEAN
items.desc: A lead-gen + concierge platform for Uber Eats onboarding: SEO content and per-city landing pages bring in search traffic, an online form captures enquiries, a back-office CRM tracks every lead, and advisors handle the whole application through to going live — so non-technical owners get on board painlessly.

items.name: GT Club Taiwan
items.label: GT
items.desc: Membership community site with three topic hubs (AI, Web3, sustainability), member application forms, categorized newsletter subscriptions, an event photo wall, and light/dark themes.

items.name: Damen KYT Anti-Fraud Platform
items.label: KYT
items.desc: A crypto anti-fraud & KYT (Know Your Transaction) platform: paste a wallet address for an instant risk score, file a report in 5 steps with an auto-generated PDF, plus blacklist/whitelist and a blockchain academy — live in Chinese and English.

items.type: Enterprise AI Knowledge Base · Fully Custom
items.name: AG Agent — Meeting Assistant
items.label: AG
items.desc: An internal AI meeting assistant: every week it auto-pulls reports and research from Google Drive, GPT produces structured highlights, Perplexity adds the latest news, and everything is vectorized for natural-language Q&A — with a dashboard, knowledge library and floating chatbot.

about.label: About Avalo
about.p1: Avalo is a digital engineering company focused on professional-grade websites and enterprise AI automation, serving clients from personal brands to enterprises. Our capabilities span design, full-stack development, cloud architecture, and security — every project above was architected, built, deployed, and maintained by Avalo end to end.
about.p2: Working with Avalo means a transparent process with clear accountability: a dedicated point of contact, regular progress updates, and someone to call when things break — no quality lost in layers of subcontracting.

features.title: Fixed prices, published first
features.desc: Every standard service is priced on this site with the market range alongside. No worrying about being overcharged, no time wasted negotiating.

features.title: Talk directly to the engineering team
features.desc: Every point of contact has an engineering background — no layers of retelling. Feasibility and timelines get answered on the spot.

features.title: Deployment & security included
features.desc: Every build ships to production with HTTPS, firewall, and security hardening — you don't just get a zip file and a goodbye.

features.title: Long-term care is the commitment
features.desc: Monthly care plans keep your site looked after year-round: backups, updates, monitoring, changes. You run the business; Avalo runs the systems.

contact.label: Start a Project
contact.intro: Standard services can be ordered online directly. For custom projects — or if you're not sure what you need — fill in the form for a free consultation. A project consultant replies within 24 hours.

form.title: Free Consultation
form.subtitle: INQUIRY FORM · Reply within 24h
form.name: Name *
form.messagePh: Briefly describe your needs, goals, timeline, or anything you'd like me to know…
form.success: Got it! Our team will reply within 24 hours.
form.error: Failed to send. Please try again or email me directly.

footer.tagline: Web Development · Enterprise AI Automation · Systems Integration

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Browse the pricing section and pick what you need.
cart.monthlyNote: Subscriptions are charged monthly by credit card after authorization (incl. tax)
cart.careSuggestNote: Your build includes the first month of care. From month two you can subscribe to continue — cancel anytime.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.name: Name *
checkout.emailNote: Order confirmation and lookup use this email
checkout.notePh: Anything you'd like me to know up front — requirements, timeline…
checkout.payMonthlyNow: Care — monthly (starts after authorization, incl. tax)
checkout.payMonthlyStart: Your first month of care is included in the build fee; the care subscription only starts billing from month 2.
checkout.payMonthlyNowNote: This is a standalone care subscription; billing starts monthly once the recurring card authorization is complete.
checkout.payHint: Checkout collects only the one-time build fee above, via ECPay's secure page. Care is billed as a recurring card authorization, set up via a separate link before month 1 ends and charged automatically from month 2 — a separate authorization from the build fee, not a double charge.
checkout.payHintCareOnly: You'll be redirected to ECPay's secure page to complete the recurring card authorization. Billing starts monthly once authorized, and can be cancelled anytime.
checkout.agreement: I have read and agree to the
checkout.error: Failed to create order. Please check the fields and retry.

order.successDesc: Your order is confirmed and a receipt has been emailed to you. A project consultant will reach out within 24 hours to start the discovery call.
order.pendingDesc: If you chose ATM / convenience store payment, the order will update automatically once payment clears.
order.failDesc: The transaction failed or was cancelled. Feel free to order again or contact our support team for help.
order.lookupDesc: Enter your order number and the email used at checkout.
order.lookupNotFound: Order not found. Please check the number and email.
